title: Luna Slimes
description: Improves Slimes and makes them configurable.
body:
Improves Slimes and make them configurable.

Slimes can now merge and split, and have been visually upgraded.

All new gameplay and visual behavior can be configured.

### Changes:

- Slime animations are now smooth, no longer stutter during gameplay.
- Added an additional squish animation to anticipates Slimes jumping.
- Added pixel-consistent textures based on the Slime's size up to size 4.
- Added a new spawning animation.
- Added a splitting animation, coupled with a new sound.
 - Particles are emitted when splitting
- Shadows now properly scale based on the Slime's "squish" animation.
- Slimes can now merge with one another.
- Magma Cubes use an entirely unique set of sounds.

### Config:

- Requires [FrozenLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/frozenlib), [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to configure in-game
